---
title: "Week 9: ARIMA models (part 2)"
---

```{r}
week <- 9
source(here::here("course_info.R"))
```

## What you will learn this week

* AR, MA, ARMA and ARIMA models
* Selecting model orders manually and automatically

## Pre-class activities

Read [Sections 9.3-9.8 of the textbook](https://otexts.com/fpp3/arima.html) and watch all embedded videos

## Monday lecture

```{r}
#| output: asis
show_slides(week)
```

<!-- * [Code used in lecture](lecture_code.R) -->

## Tuesday workshop

```{r}
#| output: asis
#show_activity(week)
show_quiz(week)
```

<!-- * [Code used in workshop](workshop_code.R) -->

## Exercises (on your own or in tutorial)

* Complete Exercises 6-10 from [Section 9.11 of the book](https://otexts.com/fpp3/arima-exercises.html).
<!-- * [Solutions to Exercises](ex9-sol.qmd) -->

```{r}
#| output: asis
show_assignments(week)
```
